allow: Bash(git add CLAUDE.md && git rm PLAN.md && git add .replit)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add CLAUDE.md and retire v2 research plan

Replace the Evergreen v2 research document \(PLAN.md\) with CLAUDE.md —
a lean developer reference covering design principles, tech stack,
file structure, and definition of done for Evergreen v3. This
captures the decisions made in the v3 brainstorm before development begins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git status && git stash pop 2>/dev/null; git restore --staged .github 2>/dev/null; git reset HEAD .github 2>/dev/null; git add cli.py tests/ && git status)
Bash(pip install anthropic openai inspect-ai inspect-evals -q 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(git add app/core/catalog.py app/core/jobs.py app/templates/partials/run_status.html app/routes/runs.py app/templates/history.html app/templates/partials/benchmark_detail.html app/models.py && git diff --cached --stat)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Performance pass: 7 targeted fixes for MVP stability

catalog.py: O\(1\) benchmark lookups via dict index \(_index alongside _cache\)
  - get_benchmark\(\) was O\(N\) list scan on every eval start, detail click,
    and report render; now O\(1\) dict.get\(\)

jobs.py: Move TTL eviction off the status-poll hot path
  - _evict_expired\(\) was called on every get_job\(\) \(every 3s poll per user\)
  - Now only runs in create_job\(\); get_job\(\) is O\(1\)
  - Add 200-job hard cap with oldest-first eviction to prevent unbounded growth

run_status.html: Stop HTMX polling when job fails
  - Failed state was polling indefinitely; adds a script that removes
    hx-trigger from the status-region div immediately on failure

runs.py: PDF export moved to thread pool
  - WeasyPrint was blocking the event loop for 2-8s on every export
  - Wrapped in asyncio.to_thread so other requests stay responsive

runs.py + history.html: History pagination \(25 per page\)
  - History was fetching 100 rows unconditionally; now paginated with
    page query param, total_pages, prev/next controls in template

benchmark_detail.html: Remove epochs dead code
  - epochs field submitted but silently ignored by POST handler
  - Removed; Advanced section now shows only the sample-limit selector

models.py: Index on Run.created_at
  - History ORDER BY created_at DESC now uses an index instead of full scan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
